texto: Because the bulk of a platform's value is created by its community of users, the platform business must shift its focus from internal activities to external activities. In the process the firm inverts-it turns inside out, with functions from marketing to information technology to operations to strategy all increasingly centering on people, resources, and functions that exist outside the business, complementing or replacing those that exists inside a traditional business.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Geoffrey G. Parker sobre temas ligados a negocios. A afirmação “Because the bulk of a platform's value is created by its community of users, the platform busines…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a negocios, business, firms, útil em momentos de firms e platform-building.
